items.title: Java News Roundup: GraalVM, Spring AI, JobRunr, GlassFish, Grails, Groovy, Quarkus Agent MCP
items.summaryShort: Java News Roundup: GraalVM, Spring AI, JobRunr, GlassFish, Grails, Groovy, Quarkus Agent MCP. This week's Java roundup for May 4th, 2026, features news highlighting: OpenJDK JEPs targeted for JDK 27; the sixth milestone release of Spring AI

items.title: MySQL 9.7: First Major LTS Since 8.4 Brings Enterprise Features to Community Edition
items.summaryShort: MySQL 9.7: First Major LTS Since 8.4 Brings Enterprise Features to Community Edition. Oracle has announced the general availability of MySQL 9.7.0, marking the start of a new 9.7 LTS release series and the first major one since MySQL 8.4.

items.title: Fonttrio Launches as Open-Source Font Pairing Registry for shadcn/ui
items.summaryShort: Fonttrio Launches as Open-Source Font Pairing Registry for shadcn/ui. Fonttrio is an open-source font pairing registry designed for shadcn/ui projects, featuring 49 curated font combinations that can be installed via a single command.

items.title: Cloudflare Ships Dynamic Workflows, Bringing Durable Execution to Per-Tenant and Per-Agent Code
items.summaryShort: Cloudflare Ships Dynamic Workflows, Bringing Durable Execution to Per-Tenant and Per-Agent Code. Cloudflare released Dynamic Workflows, an MIT-licensed library that extends its durable execution engine so workflow code can differ per tenant

items.title: AWS Improves Aurora Serverless: 45% Faster Ramp-Up, 30% Higher Throughput
items.summaryShort: AWS Improves Aurora Serverless: 45% Faster Ramp-Up, 30% Higher Throughput. AWS has recently announced that WorkMail will be discontinued and that App Runner will stop accepting new customers and move into maintenance mode.

items.title: Get ready for the whisper-filled office of the future
items.summaryShort: Get ready for the whisper-filled office of the future. How will work setups change if we spend more and more time talking to our computers?

items.title: Anthropic says ‘evil’ portrayals of AI were responsible for Claude’s blackmail attempts
items.summaryShort: Anthropic says ‘evil’ portrayals of AI were responsible for Claude’s blackmail attempts. Fictional portrayals of artificial intelligence can have a real effect on AI models, according to Anthropic.

items.title: Uber has always wanted to be more than a ride; now it has reason to hurry
